name: Zov's Lentil Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh cilantro or fresh basil, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook's notes: Zov Karamardian suggests preparing this salad just before serving for the freshest flavor. You can add diced green or yellow zucchini in place of the carrot if preferred, or cooked corn or peas if desired. If preferred, use half lemon juice and half balsamic vinegar. Do not season until ready to serve.
2. Do not soak lentils. Using a large saucepan or Dutch oven, cook lentils in boiling water until tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Rinse the cooked lentils under cold water and drain thoroughly.
4. In a separate saucepan, blanch celery, bell pepper, and carrot until cooked tender-crisp.
5. Combine the cooked lentils, blanched vegetables, red onion, green onion, parsley, cilantro (or basil); toss lightly.
6. Add lemon juice and toss again.
7. Add extra-virgin olive oil to taste and season with salt and pepper.
